shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 3 \( -path './node_modules' -o -path './.git' \) -prune -o -type d -print | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200
find pages components styles -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort | xargs -I{} sh -lc 'echo "--- {}"; sed -n "1,220p" "{}"'
test -d node_modules/next/dist/docs && find node_modules/next/dist/docs -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#DOC # ' | head -100

cat package.json && printf '
--- tsconfig ---
' && cat tsconfig.json && printf '
--- next config ---
' && cat next.config.ts

sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/02-guides/migrating/app-router-migration.mdx && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/03-file-conventions/error.mdx && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/03-file-conventions/not-found.mdx && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/15-route-handlers.mdx

find app components -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort && printf '
---
' && find . -maxdepth 3 -type d | sort | sed -n '1,120p' && printf '
--- tsconfig ---
' && cat tsconfig.json
test -d pages && echo PAGES_EXISTS || echo PAGES_REMOVED
